name: Santander Bank ATM
description_short: Santander Bank operates a network of ATMs across New York City, including standalone locations and co-branded ATMs at CVS pharmacies for convenient cash access.
description_long: Santander Bank is a major financial institution operating multiple ATM locations throughout New York City to serve retail and business customers. The bank maintains both standalone ATMs at their branch locations and a partnership with CVS pharmacy chains, placing ATMs in high-traffic retail environments across Manhattan. Their ATM network provides customers with convenient access to cash withdrawal services with varying availability—some locations offer 24-hour access while others operate during specific store hours. The CVS co-branded ATMs represent a significant portion of their network presence, indicating a strategy to maximize accessibility in neighborhoods throughout the city including midtown, downtown, and residential areas. Santander's ATM service is complementary to their full banking offerings, which include retail online banking, mortgage accounts, business banking, investment services, and consumer credit cards. The network spans multiple NYC neighborhoods with documented locations on Broadway, Madison Avenue, Fifth Avenue, and various cross streets throughout Manhattan. Unlike standalone ATM operators, Santander's ATM network is backed by an established bank with full deposit, lending, and wealth management capabilities. The main limitation is that these ATMs are primarily located in New York City with no indication of nationwide or multi-state presence in the provided documentation.
pros: 24-hour ATM access available at multiple locations (1619 Broadway, 150 E 42nd St, 222 East 34th Street, 75 Christopher St, 630 Lexington Ave, 298 Mulberry St, 65 5th Ave)
CVS partnership provides ATM access at 15+ retail pharmacy locations across Manhattan neighborhoods
Multiple branch locations also feature ATMs for customers seeking in-person banking services alongside cash access
Phone support available at (877) 768-2265 for CVS ATM locations
ATMs strategically located in high-traffic areas including Times Square, Midtown, East Village, and financial districts
Integration with full Santander banking services including online banking, mortgages, and investment accounts
Some CVS ATM locations reopening at 7am for early morning access (e.g., 81 Eighth Ave, 338 E 23rd St)
cons: ATM network appears limited to New York City with no evidence of broader geographic coverage
CVS co-branded ATMs may impose surcharges for non-Santander customers (not disclosed on website)
No information provided about ATM fees, withdrawal limits, or transaction capabilities
Some CVS locations have limited hours (reopening at 7am) rather than true 24-hour access
Website does not display ATM-specific features like cash deposit capability, check deposit, or balance inquiry options
best_for: New York City residents and workers seeking convenient cash access near Santander branch locations
Santander bank customers in Manhattan needing 24-hour ATM access for emergency cash withdrawals
CVS pharmacy shoppers in NYC looking to withdraw cash during retail errands at neighborhood locations
diagnosis: Santander Bank ATMs are best for Manhattan-based customers of Santander who need reliable, strategically-located cash access, particularly those who value 24-hour availability or prefer CVS pharmacy locations. The main caveat is that this service is geographically limited to New York City and the website provides minimal information about ATM-specific features, fees, or capabilities beyond basic location and hours data.
services: 24-hour ATM cash withdrawals at select locations
ATM access during CVS pharmacy operating hours at 15+ locations
ATM services at Santander Bank branch financial centers
Retail online banking access via ATM card
Branch ATM services at 2228 Broadway location
Branch ATM services at 330 Madison Avenue location
Branch ATM services at 841 Broadway location
CVS ATM network across Manhattan neighborhoods
Get Directions feature for locating nearest ATM
Financial Center details and ATM-specific information pages
Integrated banking services accessible via ATM cardholders
